Emergency services responded promptly, transporting the injured to local hospitals for medical attention.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/noida/greater-noida-several-injured-as-multiple-vehicles-collide-on-eastern-peripheral-expressway-amid-dense-fog/articleshow/125944667.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/noida/greater-noida-several-injured-as-multiple-vehicles-collide-on-eastern-peripheral-expressway-amid-dense-fog/articleshow/125944667.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Dec 2025 11:01:42 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="22970" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125944819,imgsize-22970.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Watch: Trump calls resurfaced photos with Epstein 'no big deal']]></title><description><![CDATA[President Trump dismissed newly released photos with Jeffrey Epstein as "no big deal," stating many people knew the convicted sex offender. House Democrats shared over 95,000 images, including those of Trump, Bill Clinton, and Bill Gates, raising questions about Epstein's network. The White House accused Democrats of politicizing the release.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/watch-donald-trump-reacts-to-resurfaced-photos-with-epstein-calls-it-no-big-deal/articleshow/125944893.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/watch-donald-trump-reacts-to-resurfaced-photos-with-epstein-calls-it-no-big-deal/articleshow/125944893.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Dec 2025 11:04:29 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="178802" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125945318,imgsize-178802.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Thane snakebite case: How cops unravelled woman's death as murder after 3 years;]]></title><description><![CDATA[Three years after a woman's death from a snakebite was ruled accidental, police have arrested her husband and three friends, revealing a murder conspiracy. The husband allegedly orchestrated the killing due to domestic disputes, enlisting a snake rescuer friend to provide the venomous snake used in the fatal incident.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/thane/thane-snakebite-case-how-cops-unravelled-womans-death-as-murder-after-3-years-husband-friends-held/articleshow/125944767.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/thane/thane-snakebite-case-how-cops-unravelled-womans-death-as-murder-after-3-years-husband-friends-held/articleshow/125944767.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Dec 2025 12:14:07 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>PRADEEP GUPTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="23800" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125945741,imgsize-23800.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA['Only politicians, actors were surrounding Messi': Kolkata fans left frustrated]]></title><description><![CDATA[Hundreds of fans erupted in anger at Kolkata's Salt Lake Stadium after Lionel Messi's brief appearance at a ticketed event. Spectators threw bottles and chairs, with some breaking barricades, frustrated by their inability to see the football star after paying high ticket prices. The event was marred by poor crowd management and unmet expectations.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/kolkata/only-politicians-actors-were-surrounding-messi-frustrated-fans-cause-chaos-at-kolkatas-salt-lake-stadium-watch/articleshow/125946012.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/kolkata/only-politicians-actors-were-surrounding-messi-frustrated-fans-cause-chaos-at-kolkatas-salt-lake-stadium-watch/articleshow/125946012.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Sat, 13 Dec 2025 12:41:53 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="4431137" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-125946410,imgsize-4431137.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <title><![CDATA[India’s AI royalty plan ‘not sustainable’, likely to fail in implementation: Quantum Hub’s Rohit Kumar]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/technology/india-ai-royalty-framework-mandatory-ai-licensing-not-sustainable-expert-19790143.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[India’s ambitious push to establish a compulsory royalty system for AI training data is drawing early scepticism from policy circles. Experts warn that the global-revenue-based fee structure and the proposed blanket licensing regime could create operational bottlenecks, diminish creator autonomy, and complicate commercial deployment for AI companies. As consultations begin, the debate is shifting from principle to practicality — and whether the framework can be meaningfully implemented at scale.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[The company said the operationalisation of this facility strengthens the group’s backward and forward integration capabilities. Shares of Deepak Nitrite Ltd ended at ₹1,536.40, up by ₹14.65, or 0.96%, on the BSE today, December 4.]]></description>
